objective: Implement PU-000 so later Codex Runtime Evidence Verifier Cockpit slices cannot start without a reviewed intent artifact, contract baseline, ordering guard, and automated acceptance coverage.
outOfScope: Runtime evidence implementation files for PU-001 through PU-016 before this intent is reviewed
Public command surfaces unless a tiny validator command is proven to be the narrowest pattern
GitHub PR creation before PU-000 validation and review pass
Any claim that PU-000 completes the full runtime evidence verifier cockpit

automationPlan.name: acceptance coverage validation
proves: all mechanically checkable SA IDs have validator, test, fixture, command, or schema assertion coverage

automationPlan.name: intent ordering guard
proves: PU-001 through PU-016 implementation paths are blocked before reviewed PU-000 intent

automationPlan.name: contract freeze validation
proves: acceptance IDs, lifecycle labels, forbidden paths, stop conditions, validation gates, and rollback obligations are compared to baselineRef

automationPlan.name: contract baseline validation
proves: baselineRef is immutable enough for PU-000 ordering and contract-freeze checks

automationPlan.name: goal board validation
proves: goal board remains valid after PU-000 state updates

postReviewMutationPolicy: any mutation to intent-controlled fields after reviewStatus=reviewed resets reviewStatus to pending and invalidates reviewReceiptRef unless reviewedIntentSha256 is updated by a new review receipt

blockedWhen: next slice depends on an unmerged PR under triage
PR triage subagent owns the same branch the coordinator would mutate
parallelPrTriageStrategy.safeFallback: perform non-mutating next-slice prep, intent drafting, discovery, or review while PR triage runs

stopConditions: Stop if this intent lacks objective, owned acceptance IDs, deep module boundary, automation plan, reviewStatus, reviewReceiptRef, baselineRef, linearIssue, or reviewedAt.

Stop if reviewReceiptRef cannot resolve to a pass receipt bound to this intentId, reviewedIntentSha256, required reviewer roles, expected artifact refs, verifiedAt, status pass, and evidenceUse claim_support or audit_trail.
Stop if any PU-001 through PU-016 lifecycle implementation path was changed before this intent reached reviewed status.
Stop if an unknown runtime or governance path is touched and cannot be classified by guardedPathGlobs.
Stop if acceptance coverage cannot map every mechanically checkable SA ID to a validator, test, fixture, command, or schema assertion.
rollback: Remove src/lib/plan-gate/lifecycle-intent*.ts files added by PU-000.
Keep plan and spec unchanged unless a reviewed contract patch says otherwise.
Restore this intent to pending if review evidence is invalidated.
assumptions: JSC-363 remains the implementation owner until PU-000 records a different owner with Linear evidence.
The intent and baseline artifacts may live under .harness/intent because they are execution-control artifacts for this lifecycle.
Lifecycle intent validation belongs under the existing src/lib/plan-gate deep module because plan-gate already owns plan artifact validation, acceptance evidence, plan IDs, and traceability.
